'''tangufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:lmrna|lmrna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lmrna|lmrna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tangufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængifith|tængifith]] || [[word:tængifij|tængifij]] || [[word:tængifish|tængifish]] || [[word:tængifi|tængifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangungufuth|tangungufuth]] || [[word:tangungufuj|tangungufuj]] || [[word:tangungufush|tangungufush]] || [[word:tangungufu|tangungufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tangufuth|tangufuth]] || [[word:tangufuj|tangufuj]] || [[word:tangufush|tangufush]] || [[word:tangufu|tangufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanguffuth|tanguffuth]] || [[word:tanguffuj|tanguffuj]] || [[word:tanguffush|tanguffush]] || [[word:tanguffuf|tanguffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tangufuthu|tangufuthu]] || [[word:tangufuju|tangufuju]] || [[word:tangufushu|tangufushu]] || [[word:tangufuku|tangufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tangufuth|tangufuth]] || [[word:tangufuj|tangufuj]] || [[word:tangufush|tangufush]] || [[word:tangufu|tangufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tangufuthul|tangufuthul]] || [[word:tangufujul|tangufujul]] || [[word:tangufushul|tangufushul]] || [[word:tangufukul|tangufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tangufuthuthu|tangufuthuthu]] || [[word:tangufujuju|tangufujuju]] || [[word:tangufushushu|tangufushushu]] || [[word:tangufuku|tangufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tangufuthun|tangufuthun]] || [[word:tangufujun|tangufujun]] || [[word:tangufushun|tangufushun]] || [[word:tangufukun|tangufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tangufuthuoro|tangufuthuoro]] || [[word:tangufujuoro|tangufujuoro]] || [[word:tangufushuoro|tangufushuoro]] || [[word:tangufukuoro|tangufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
